name: Aquarium
description: Glass walls, blue lights, jellyfish — spot it before the kids run off.
title: B · I · N · G · O
subtitle: Eyes on the tank — first to five in a row wins!
items: A jellyfish drifting by
A shark gliding past
A fish bigger than your head
A sea turtle
A stingray like a flying pancake
An octopus (if you can spot it)
A 'do not tap the glass' sign
A splash from the touch pool
A diver cleaning a tank
A kid pressed against the glass
A tank that feels way too small
A tank you could almost live in
Coral that glows under blue light
A starfish
A moray eel peeking out
A clownfish (a 'Nemo')
A blue tang (a 'Dory')
A bubble curtain along a wall
A penguin or puffin exhibit
An otter floating on its back
A seal or sea-lion show announcement
A stroller traffic jam
A school of fish turning as one
An eel you swear just moved
A crab walking sideways
A 'feeding time' sign
An aquarium map
A bubble from a diver's tank
A tank with no visible fish (at first)
Someone asking 'is that real?'
A kid naming every fish
A seahorse hanging on to something
A bright orange or yellow fish
An 'endangered' species sign
A touch tank with starfish
An animal hiding behind a rock
A bench in front of a massive window
A 'please don't use flash' sign
